title: Was moshe's fate tied to yisrael? Was his future bound-by/inextricably-tied-to their rhythms, decisions, choices? I can think of arguments for yes and for no.
body:
# yes
- Moshe was not able to enter the promised Land alone, ahead of israel, at a different stage 
- Moshe was stuck in the wilderness for 40 years with Israel because of Israel's choices 
# no
- Yahweh told Moshe to step aside so he could destroy Israel and start anew with Moshe
